data.content: [implementation_review 2026-04-29] Diff against origin/main is +183/-3 across .changeset/linked-worktree-store-share.md, src/main.rs, src/project.rs, src/project_tests_ext.rs, src/project_worktree.rs. project_worktree::store_root_base_for resolves primary worktree via git rev-parse --git-common-dir; git_context derives store_paths.root from it while keeping repo_root at the invoked worktree. Tests cover both linked+primary worktrees and the resolve_context path. make sanity passes at 95.13% coverage. No invariant violations or regressions found. Approved.
